title: Web-to-Cloud: Exfiltrated Data Evidence
description: Combines application export messages, VCN Flow egress, Network Firewall threat alerts, and OCI Audit object reads to show what data left the environment and which destination received it.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC VCN Flow Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Network Firewall Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs') and ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77' or 'Threat Name' = 'Suspicious Data Exfiltration' or 'Resource Name' like '*customer-export-2026-05.csv*') | stats count as Evidence, unique('Bytes Sent') as BytesSent, unique('Resource Name') as Resources, unique('Threat Name') as Threats by 'Log Source', 'Destination IP', 'User Name', 'Trace ID' | sort -Evidence

ask_ai_prompts: What data was exfiltrated and which logs prove it?
Connect the Object Storage object read to the outbound network destination.
